name: Alireza Samaei Yekta
p1: I am Alireza Samaei Yekta. I'm FrontEnd Developer and also web designer & Ui/Ux designer in Moshanir Power Engineering Consultants.
p2: I was born in  1994 and I'm from Tehran/Iran. I'm single .
p3: I hold a bachelor's degree of software engineer from Azad university of Tehran and responsive design certificate from university of London.
p4: For the first time I started with C# programing but after some years I got interested in programming and  put all my time and effort into studying front end programming in 2013 .
p5: After a few years I started working professionally as a front end designer
p6: Additionally, I have teaching background about microsoft office in Moshanir Power Engineering Consultants and C# in Salam Highschool
p8: There are three responses to a piece of design — yes, no, and WOW! Wow is the one to aim for!
